scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: fetched Vercel's complete, official, live OpenAPI 3.x document directly (https://openapi.vercel.sh/, 332 real method+path operations across the entire Vercel platform API, reviewed 2026-07-04), every one covered or excluded with a specific, real per-endpoint reason (no blanket bucket). Covered: 9 read streams — deployments, cursor-paginated projects/teams/domains/aliases, fan_out-driven project_env_vars (every project's environment variables), and 3 new top-level collections converted from a prior blanket exclusion (webhooks, log_drains, edge_configs) — and 18 write actions across projects, deployments, project domains, project environment variables, webhooks, log drains, edge configs, and alias removal. Excluded, every one with a specific per-endpoint category and reason: single-item detail GETs duplicating an already-covered list stream (duplicate_of, 34); Enterprise/team-admin surfaces, credential/token issuance, domain-registrar purchasing, WAF/security config, TLS certs, and per-domain/per-project sub-resources needing an undeclared fan_out (requires_elevated_scope, 145); destructive account-wide toggles — attack mode, edge-cache purge, user-account deletion (destructive_admin, 8); health-check/profile/audit-log/diagnostic-verification/transient-log-stream endpoints (non_data_endpoint, 8); Remote Caching binary artifact blobs (binary_payload, 9); and a curated remainder of real, individually-reasoned product surfaces distinct from this connector's core deployments/projects/domains/env-vars/webhooks/log-drains/edge-config/aliases scope — bulk redirects, feature flags, routing middleware, custom environments, Sandbox ephemeral compute, VCR container registry, rollback/promote, deployment checks (out_of_scope, 101).
